name: xs-leak-labs
description: Educational XS-Leak labs: download detection and WebSocket pool detection.

scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check labs/download-detection/app.js && node --check labs/websocket-detection/app.js && node --check lib/cookie-utils.js && node --check lib/template-utils.js && node --check e2e/download-detection.spec.js && node --check e2e/websocket-detection.spec.js && node --check e2e/helpers/server-control.js && node --check playwright.config.js
scripts.test:e2e:websocket:all: echo "[note] websocket:all runs firefox+safari only by design" && playwright test -c playwright.config.js e2e/websocket-detection.spec.js --project=firefox --project=safari
scripts.test:e2e:websocket:chrome: echo "[note] chrome is expected to fail for current websocket xs-leak payload" && playwright test -c playwright.config.js e2e/websocket-detection.spec.js --project=chrome
